entries.name: Hybrid RAG (Vector + Keyword Search)
entries.notes: Combining vector and keyword search with reciprocal rank fusion consistently outperforms either alone.

entries.name: Structured Output with JSON Schema Enforcement
entries.notes: Schema-enforced structured output eliminates parsing failures in agent-to-agent communication.

entries.name: Stateless Iteration Workers
entries.notes: Run one iteration, persist all state, return. Crash-safe and rate-limit-resilient.

entries.name: Tiered Memory with TTL
entries.notes: Permanent / 90-day / 30-day tiers with automatic Cosmos DB TTL cleanup.

entries.name: Prompt Caching (Static Prefix Ordering)
entries.notes: Static content first in system prompts for API-level prefix caching at 50% cost discount.

entries.name: Cosmos DB for Agent State
entries.notes: Document model fits agent state naturally. Change feed, TTL, and partition key design are the key considerations.

entries.name: Azure Functions for Scheduled Pipelines
entries.notes: Timer triggers for daily/weekly batch pipelines. Near-zero cost when idle.

entries.name: Semantic Kernel (Core Abstractions)
entries.notes: Plugin model and auto function calling provide a solid LLM abstraction. Built-in agents are basic.

entries.name: .NET for AI Agents
entries.notes: Strong typing, good performance for orchestration. Ecosystem gap vs Python is narrowing.

entries.name: Evolution Engine (Execution Trace Reflection)
entries.notes: Reflection on execution traces creates a learning feedback loop. Proposal quality varies widely.

entries.name: DAG-Based Task Planning
entries.notes: Goal decomposition into task DAGs with parallel execution. Re-planning after failures not yet reliable.

entries.name: Confidence-Based Human Escalation
entries.notes: Agents pause and alert humans when confidence drops below threshold (0.4). Needs per-agent calibration.

entries.name: Cost Budget Governance
entries.notes: Per-goal, daily, and weekly cost caps. Budget levels still being calibrated.

entries.name: MCP (Model Context Protocol)
entries.notes: Standardized tool integration protocol. Ecosystem is early, some serialization quirks.

entries.name: Microsoft.Extensions.AI (MAF)
entries.notes: Unified abstraction over chat clients and embeddings. Migration path from SK-native still evolving.

entries.name: Git Worktree Isolation for Agent Coding
entries.notes: Per-task worktrees prevent conflicts. Merge conflict resolution between concurrent worktrees is manual.

entries.name: Semantic Kernel OpenAPI Plugin Import
entries.notes: Import swagger.json as kernel functions. Large APIs need manual filtering via OperationSelectionPredicate.

entries.name: Self-Modifying AI Systems
entries.notes: Achieved once successfully. Open questions on necessity gating, drift, and evaluator independence.

entries.name: GraphRAG (Knowledge Graph + Retrieval)
entries.notes: Superior for multi-hop reasoning but construction cost is high. Hybrid RAG sufficient for most tasks.

entries.name: Multi-Agent Orchestration
entries.notes: Infrastructure exists (discovery, message bus, routing) but agents do not yet actively delegate.

entries.name: Agentic Coding (LLM Writes Production Code)
entries.notes: Daily use but requires significant guardrails for read:write ratio and over-engineering tendencies.

entries.name: Local LLM Hosting for Agent Workloads
entries.notes: Quality gap vs frontier models is significant for code generation. GPU management burden is non-trivial.

entries.name: OpenTelemetry for AI Agent Observability
entries.notes: AI-specific semantic conventions still evolving. Visualization tools lack agent execution trace support.

entries.name: Pure Vector Search Without Keyword Fallback
entries.notes: Misses exact term matches. Always pair with keyword search (hybrid RAG).

entries.name: Autonomous Deployment Without Safety Gates
entries.notes: Highest-risk component even with gates. Without them, a single bad deployment has no human backstop.

entries.name: Unstructured LLM Output for Agent Communication
entries.notes: Structured output with schema enforcement is strictly superior. Regex parsing is fragile.

entries.name: Synchronous Multi-Turn Sessions Without Compression
entries.notes: Token costs grow quadratically. Context compression at 3K token threshold reduces cost by ~10x.

entries.name: Bing Search API
entries.notes: Retired August 2025. Use Azure AI Search or Playwright-based scraping as alternatives.

entries.name: LangChain for Production Systems
entries.notes: High abstraction overhead, difficult to debug. SK and MAF are better choices for .NET systems.
